titles.title: Jesus Came Down - Our God is Tremendous

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: He was worshipped in heaven Receiving honor, glory and praise Before there was a creation, I was locked up in Him Up there I fought with Michael When that old dragon was kicked out of heaven Now I'm in this terrestrial body Looking back at my victory

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And He looked at me Jesus saw I was in need Fighting this battle of good over evil So He descended to fight for me Jesus descended! Seven angels were seen in the cloud He has established His throne in my heart. Now all those devils are under my feet, Just when the enemy thought He'd destroyed me. Jesus came down to fight for me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: When I'm in need, I call on the Lord And He hears me, yes, He helps me He is faithful, and true, Won't forget His own My Companion, my best friend, The only True God, There's no one greater A Wonderful Savior, O Jesus, The Lion of Judah!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Our God is tremendous, His strength never faileth He'll go through the Fire, j ust to save a sinner Yes He is almighty, He sends His angels to guide me.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: There's no storm too pow'rful, Our God cannot handle Our God in simplicity Revealed in you and me Came down from His glory And gives us the vict'ry The greatest love story!
